parameters.query: SELECT text, metadata::text AS metadata, 1 - (embedding <=> '{{ $json.embedding_pgvector }}'::vector) AS similarity_score FROM cruzeiros WHERE embedding IS NOT NULL ORDER BY embedding <=> '{{ $json.embedding_pgvector }}'::vector LIMIT {{ $json.top_k }};

SELECT text, metadata::text AS metadata, 1 - (embedding <=> '{{ $json.embedding_pgvector }}'::vector) AS similarity_score FROM basedeconhecimento WHERE embedding IS NOT NULL ORDER BY embedding <=> '{{ $json.embedding_pgvector }}'::vector LIMIT {{ $json.top_k }};

json.query: Embaixador em Alto-mar Gusttavo Lima dezembro 2026
